upstream_projects.name: Blender
upstream_projects.purpose: Embedded Python runtime and authoring environment for addon and pipeline tooling.

module_groups.name: blender_embedded_python
module_groups.purpose: Blender addon runtime and viewport tooling.

notes: These modules are provided by Blender's embedded Python and are not expected in the workspace venv.
Validate this stack by running the relevant scripts inside Blender or Blender's bundled Python.
